content.claim: Poland's 2018 PISA results showing top European performance and reduced inequality gaps reflect the outgoing gimnazjum cohort that was not exposed to the 8+4 reversed structure, not evidence of the new system's effectiveness.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Polish system reform lens
limitations: Post-2017 PISA cohorts are now available but require separate analysis
The source itself characterizes this as a 'paradox' indicating methodological caution about pre-post reform comparisons
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
